headline: AI-native games builder and hackathon/community organizer in San Francisco
summary: I am Jessy Tang, based in San Francisco, and I am exploring AI-native games, creator tools, and agent-mediated communities. My recent work and interests center on Arcade AI, game creation, hackathons, founder/investor networks, and helping people connect around AI, games, and new product ideas. I use Hi / Hirey.ai through Codex to discover relevant people, coordinate warm introductions, and schedule focused conversations.
